comments.author: @toooldtocare123
comments.text:
Travel to Pakistan requires a high degree of caution due to terrorism, civil unrest, and kidnappings. Western governments issue Level 3 advisories urging citizens to "reconsider travel". All travel is strongly advised against for the Afghanistan border, the Line of Control, and Balochistan. 

U.S. Department of State (.gov)
 +3
Key safety realities:
Terrorism: Extremist attacks are a major concern and can happen without warning in major cities like Islamabad, Karachi, and Lahore.
Civil Unrest: Political protests and sectarian tensions frequently disrupt transport and result in movement restrictions or curfews.
Regional Risk: Clashes along the Pakistan-Afghanistan border and tensions with India along the Line of Control present significant volatilite
